problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Mitochondrial. Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
